# Diame Sene — dsene.dev

## Who is Diame Sene?
Diame Sene is a Software & EE Project Leader at Ampere Software Technology (Renault Group), based in Guyancourt, Île-de-France, France. Originally from Senegal (Dakar), he works across Europe and francophone Africa.

## Professional Role
- **Current position**: Software & EE Project Leader at Ampere Software Technology (Renault Group) since April 2023
- **Specialization**: Connectivity/telematics ECUs — development, diagnostics, DV/PV validation, AI-driven engineering
- **Previous**: Apprentice Engineer at Renault Group (2019-2022)

## Education
- **CESI** — Engineering degree in Embedded Electrical and Electronic Systems (2019-2022)
- **IUT Poitiers-Niort-Châtellerault** — DUT in Electrical Engineering and Industrial Computing (2017-2019)
- **Anthropic** — Claude 101 Certification (March 2026)

## Freelance & Side Projects
Diame also works as a freelance developer and AI builder, creating:

### Products (sold on Gumroad)
1. **LinkedIn AI Prospector** — n8n workflow that automates LinkedIn prospection with Claude AI scoring and bilingual message generation
2. **AI Content Factory** — n8n workflow that transforms 1 LinkedIn post into 5 content formats (Thread X, Newsletter, Instagram, Video Script, Blog SEO)
3. **AI Cold Email Outreach** — n8n workflow that scrapes prospect websites, analyzes pain points with Claude AI, and generates hyper-personalized cold emails

### Applications
1. **Samacours** — EdTech platform with 800+ lessons aligned with Senegalese curriculum, AI tutor, gamification (Flutter, Firebase)
2. **Gunoor** — P2P car rental marketplace for Senegal with Wave (FCFA) & Stripe (EUR) payments (Next.js 15, Prisma)
3. **ClubStats Pro** — EA Sports FC Pro Clubs stats & management tool (Next.js, Supabase)

## Technical Skills
- **Embedded**: DoIP, UDS, CAN, ECU diagnostics
- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, Flutter, React Native, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL
- **AI**: Claude API (Anthropic), OpenAI GPT-4, RAG, LangChain
- **Automation**: n8n, Make
- **Payments**: Wave (FCFA), Stripe (EUR)
- **Deployment**: Vercel, GitHub Actions CI/CD

## Services Offered
1. Full-Stack Web & Mobile Development (Next.js, Flutter)
2. AI Integration & RAG (Claude, GPT-4)
3. No-Code Automation (n8n, Make)
4. Embedded Systems Engineering (DoIP, UDS, CAN)
5. Digital AI Products (Gumroad, n8n workflows)
6. AI & No-Code Training (Bootcamps, Workshops)
